label: PMI Waterfall Project Lifecycle
description: 8-phase sequential waterfall lifecycle (W1–W8) with formal change control, baseline locking, and strict gate enforcement. Covers initiation through closure with 32 governance artifacts.

phases.name: Initiation
phases.description: Business case approval, project chartering, and governance authority establishment.

phases.name: Planning
phases.description: Work breakdown, project management plan, risk management, and procurement planning.

phases.name: Requirements
phases.description: Requirements traceability, system design specification, and security control mapping.

phases.name: Build
phases.description: Build documentation, configuration management, and code review records.

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Verification test planning, validation reporting, and QA sign-off.

phases.name: Deployment
phases.description: Deployment checklist, production readiness review, and rollback strategy.

phases.name: Operations
phases.description: Operations monitoring, performance baselining, and incident logging.

phases.name: Closure
phases.description: Lessons learned, final audit report, and financial close-out.
